notableEvents.label: Bo Bichette GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bo Bichette grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Juan Soto out at 2nd. Bo Bichette out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Francisco Lindor plunked
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Lindor hit by pitch. Francisco Alvarez to 2nd.
